summary: Solid two‑set college show with good playing; recording quality not discussed.
review: The concert is described as a typical ’79 college gig – two sets and an encore performed well, though nothing mind‑bending occurs. Reviewers note the hot venue and Garcia’s red shirt, but give no details on the audio source or its fidelity.

ai_rating.rationale: One detailed review rates the show 4/5 for performance; recording quality is unknown, so a moderate score reflects solid playing but lack of audio information.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments on soundboard, audience mix, clarity, or other technical aspects were provided.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Two sets and an encore typical of a college venue in 1979; the band played solidly but without extraordinary improvisations.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Performance described as well‑played, no specific guitar details.
